name: Learning to Code Through Fun Games and Activities for Kids

chat_messages.text: Write a one sentence answers for why I want to work for the company kodable with the following information: Kodable helps kids learn coding through interactive games and self-guided activities. No prior coding knowledge is required, students start from beginner level and work their way up to advanced levels where they get to use coding syntax to write commands in simplified versions of JavaScript or Swift.

I want to work for Kodable because they provide an engaging, interactive way for children to learn coding concepts and programming languages through games and activities that scaffold learning from beginner to advanced levels.
Make it more about me personally and tie it in with the above information

As someone passionate about education and technology, I want to work for Kodable because their interactive games and scaffolded coding curriculum enable children to progress from no prior experience to writing their own code in JavaScript and Swift, fulfilling my goal of helping the next generation gain vital technical skills.
Make it more passion driven like I want to make game an develop amazing game mechanics that drive kids creativity

With a lifelong passion for gaming and a drive to spark children's creativity, I want to work for Kodable to help develop immersive coding games and activities that will not only teach vital programming skills, but also ignite young imaginations to explore computer science through the thrill of interactive stories and puzzles.
